rounds.plan_think: The document seems to involve a case related to intellectual property as it mentions "四川某知识产权服务有限公司" (Sichuan Certain Intellectual Property Service Co., Ltd.). Therefore, I will inspect the chunk that provides more details on the case background and the parties involved to confirm if it falls under the '知识产权与竞争' category.

info.summary: 再审申请人四川某知识产权服务有限公司和夏某某因不服新疆维吾尔自治区乌鲁木齐市中级人民法院的民事判决，向本院申请再审。
info.text: 再审申请人四川某知识产权服务有限公司（以下简称某服务公司）、夏某某与被申请人新疆生产建设兵团某网站（以下简称某网站）侵害作品信息网络传播权纠纷一案，不服新疆维吾尔自治区乌鲁木齐市中级人民法院（2023）新01民终5160号民事判决，向本院申请再审。本院依法组成合议庭进行了审查，现已审查终结。

rounds.extract_think: The selected chunk indicates that the case involves a dispute over the right to disseminate works online between a company specializing in intellectual property services and a website. This clearly falls under the '知识产权与竞争' category. The chunk provides enough information to classify the document under this category.
